description: §41.14.3 — <formFor for=Signup onsubmit=fn/> requires fn(values: Signup) ! ErrorType. persistSignup here takes ZERO arguments, so the handler signature mismatch fires E-FORMFOR-ONSUBMIT-SIGNATURE.
rationale: §41.14.3: the submit handler signature SHALL match fn(values: StructType) ! ErrorType; a zero-argument handler is a signature mismatch and SHALL emit E-FORMFOR-ONSUBMIT-SIGNATURE.
